---
id: create-or-update-metadata-schema
title: "Create or update metadata schema"
description: "Defines or updates the schema for a metadata group. Schemas should be defined before indexing metadata."
sidebar_label: "Create or update metadata schema"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: api/indexing-api/glean-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create or update metadata schema"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/rest/api/index/custom-metadata/schema/{groupName}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Defines or updates the schema for a metadata group. Schemas should be defined before indexing metadata.

  id={"request"}
